texto: I wash off the night in the water, my scrapes and aches numbed by the sea. My bones have become boughs, all scarred knees and gnarled kuckles. None of us are the same person we once were, since the human body replaces itself every seven years; there have been at least six different mes.
explicacao: Citação de Philip Hoare sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “I wash off the night in the water, my scrapes and aches numbed by the sea. My bones have become b…” articula autoestima, personality-development, self em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
